title: clerodendrum lastellei
intro: Clerodendrum lastellei, also known as the Coral Tree or Lastelle's Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum lastellei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
